name: RICS NRM 2 (2nd ed, 2021) — Detailed Measurement for Building Works
description: Enables OCERP built-in validation rules that enforce the RICS New Rules of Measurement 2 (2nd edition, 2021) measurement conventions: 41 work-section structure, units of measurement, item description requirements, tabulated rules of measurement per trade, and the treatment of preliminaries, dayworks, provisional sums and contingencies.
